Class TerritoryProtectionListener

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.listener.TerritoryProtectionListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public class TerritoryProtectionListener extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Enforces territory protection in claimed chunks.

All checks are synchronous, non-blocking reads from TerritoryService and ClanCache. Unclaimed chunks are always permitted.

LEADER always bypasses every check. Members are tested against their personal ClanPermission set. Non-members are always denied.

    void
    onBlockBreak(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockBreakEvent event)
    Prevents block breaking in claimed chunks by players who lack ClanPermission.BREAK_BLOCKS.
    void
    onBlockExplode(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockExplodeEvent event)
    Prevents block explosions (e.g.
    void
    onBlockPlace(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockPlaceEvent event)
    Prevents block placing in claimed chunks by players who lack ClanPermission.PLACE_BLOCKS.
    void
    onEntityDamage(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
    Prevents players from damaging entities in claimed chunks they do not have permission for.
    void
    onEntityExplode(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityExplodeEvent event)
    Removes claimed blocks from the explosion block list, preserving the visual effect.
    void
    onHangingBreak(org.bukkit.event.hanging.HangingBreakByEntityEvent event)
    Prevents players from breaking hanging entities (item frames, paintings) in claimed chunks without ClanPermission.BREAK_BLOCKS.
    void
    onPlayerInteract(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEvent event)
    Prevents unauthorised players from interacting with blocks in claimed chunks.

  • Constructor Details

    • TerritoryProtectionListener

      public TerritoryProtectionListener(TerritoryService territoryService, ClanCache clanCache)
      Parameters:
      territoryService - used to look up the owning clan for a chunk
      clanCache - used to retrieve the acting player's clan snapshot

  • Method Details

    • onBlockBreak

      public void onBlockBreak(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockBreakEvent event)
      Prevents block breaking in claimed chunks by players who lack ClanPermission.BREAK_BLOCKS.

    • onBlockPlace

      public void onBlockPlace(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockPlaceEvent event)
      Prevents block placing in claimed chunks by players who lack ClanPermission.PLACE_BLOCKS.

    • onEntityDamage

      public void onEntityDamage(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
      Prevents players from damaging entities in claimed chunks they do not have permission for. Distinguishes between passive animals and hostile monsters.

    • onHangingBreak

      public void onHangingBreak(org.bukkit.event.hanging.HangingBreakByEntityEvent event)
      Prevents players from breaking hanging entities (item frames, paintings) in claimed chunks without ClanPermission.BREAK_BLOCKS.

    • onPlayerInteract

      public void onPlayerInteract(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerInteractEvent event)
      Prevents unauthorised players from interacting with blocks in claimed chunks. Distinguishes between containers, doors/gates/trapdoors, and general interactions.

    • onEntityExplode

      public void onEntityExplode(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityExplodeEvent event)
      Removes claimed blocks from the explosion block list, preserving the visual effect.

    • onBlockExplode

      public void onBlockExplode(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockExplodeEvent event)
      Prevents block explosions (e.g. TNT) from damaging blocks in claimed chunks.
